q: Find all issues created in the last 7 days in Customer Support
jql: project = CRM AND created >= -7d ORDER BY created DESC

q: Get all open issues in the Infrastructure & SRE project
jql: project = OPS AND status != Done ORDER BY created DESC

q: List Platform Engineering issues that are in To Do status
jql: project = PLAT AND status = "To Do" ORDER BY created DESC

q: Show me critical priority issues across all projects from the last 30 days
jql: priority = Highest AND created >= -30d ORDER BY created DESC

q: Find all bugs that are currently in progress
jql: project = BUGS AND status = "In Progress" ORDER BY created DESC

q: What CRM issues were updated in the last 7 days?
jql: project = CRM AND updated >= -7d ORDER BY updated DESC

q: Show me all Done issues in the OPS project
jql: project = OPS AND status = Done ORDER BY created DESC

q: List all issues created this month in Platform Engineering
jql: project = PLAT AND created >= startOfMonth() ORDER BY created DESC

q: Find medium priority issues in the Software Bug Triage project
jql: project = BUGS AND priority = Medium ORDER BY created DESC

q: Show all unresolved issues in Customer Support from the last 14 days
jql: project = CRM AND resolution = Unresolved AND created >= -14d ORDER BY created DESC

q: Get all issues in PLAT and OPS projects that are not done
jql: project IN (PLAT, OPS) AND status != Done ORDER BY created DESC

q: Find all low priority issues in Infrastructure & SRE
jql: project = OPS AND priority = Low ORDER BY created DESC

q: Show me issues created in the last 3 days across BUGS and CRM projects
jql: project IN (BUGS, CRM) AND created >= -3d ORDER BY created DESC

q: List all Sample Project issues that are in To Do status
jql: project = SMP AND status = "To Do" ORDER BY created DESC

q: Find all high priority issues that are currently in progress across all projects
jql: priority = High AND status = "In Progress" ORDER BY created DESC

q: Show me all resolved issues in the BUGS project from the last 30 days
jql: project = BUGS AND resolution IS NOT EMPTY AND created >= -30d ORDER BY created DESC

q: Get all issues updated this month in Customer Support
jql: project = CRM AND updated >= startOfMonth() ORDER BY updated DESC

q: Find issues with highest priority in Platform Engineering project
jql: project = PLAT AND priority = Highest ORDER BY created DESC

q: Show all issues from OPS project that were created in the last 21 days
jql: project = OPS AND created >= -21d ORDER BY created DESC

q: List all unresolved issues across BUGS, CRM, and PLAT projects
jql: project IN (BUGS, CRM, PLAT) AND resolution = Unresolved ORDER BY created DESC

q: Find all issues in the Sample Project with Done status
jql: project = SMP AND status = Done ORDER BY created DESC

q: Show me issues that were both created and updated in the last 7 days in BUGS
jql: project = BUGS AND created >= -7d AND updated >= -7d ORDER BY updated DESC

q: Get all In Progress issues from the last 30 days across all projects
jql: status = "In Progress" AND created >= -30d ORDER BY created DESC

q: Find all issues in CRM project ordered by priority from highest to lowest
jql: project = CRM ORDER BY priority DESC, created DESC

q: For all high priority issues in the BUGS project, group them by their main topic (API, mobile, documentation) and rank each group by the number of issues
Find all CRM issues related to PagerDuty integration, then identify which ones are subtasks versus parent issues and summarize the integration workflow they describe

jql: project in (BUGS, CRM) AND status = "To Do"

q: Get all issues from the OPS project created in the last 30 days, group them by priority level, and for each priority identify the main operational concerns
Find all issues mentioning datetime or timezone across all projects, then analyze which projects have the most datetime-related issues and what specific problems they describe
For the PLAT project, retrieve all issues and categorize them by engineering domain (platform, infrastructure, tooling), then rank domains by issue count

jql: project in (BUGS, CRM, OPS) AND priority = High

q: Find all BUGS issues related to API documentation (OpenAPI, code examples, tutorials), group them by documentation type, and assess the completeness of the documentation effort
jql: project = BUGS AND (text ~ "documentation" OR text ~ "tutorial" OR text ~ "OpenAPI" OR text ~ "code examples")

jql: project = CRM AND (text ~ "fraud" OR text ~ "security" OR text ~ "verification")

For all issues mentioning incident management across CRM project, map out the complete incident workflow from detection to resolution based on the issues described
Get all issues from BUGS project that mention testing or validation, group by testing type (unit tests, integration tests, CI testing), and assess test coverage gaps

jql: project in (BUGS, CRM, OPS, PLAT) AND priority = High

q: What issues in the Platform Engineering project are assigned to the authentication component?
jql: project = PLAT AND component IS NOT EMPTY

q: Find all CRM issues that have any component assigned
jql: project = CRM AND component IS NOT EMPTY

q: List issues in OPS project that don't have a fix version set
jql: project = OPS AND fixVersion IS EMPTY

q: Show me high priority bugs that have a fix version assigned
jql: project = BUGS AND priority = High AND fixVersion IS NOT EMPTY

q: What issues in PLAT have both a component and a fix version?
jql: project = PLAT AND component IS NOT EMPTY AND fixVersion IS NOT EMPTY

q: Find all To Do issues in CRM that are missing a component assignment
jql: project = CRM AND status = "To Do" AND component IS EMPTY

q: Show issues across all projects that have a fix version but are still in To Do status
jql: fixVersion IS NOT EMPTY AND status = "To Do"

q: List BUGS project issues without any fix version that are high priority
jql: project = BUGS AND fixVersion IS EMPTY AND priority = High

q: What infrastructure issues in OPS need a component to be assigned?
jql: project = OPS AND component IS EMPTY

q: Find all issues in the Sample Project that have any version information
jql: project = SMP AND (fixVersion IS NOT EMPTY OR affectedVersion IS NOT EMPTY)

q: Show me CRM issues related to PagerDuty integration that have a component
jql: project = CRM AND text ~ "PagerDuty" AND component IS NOT EMPTY

q: What subtasks in BUGS are missing a fix version?
jql: project = BUGS AND issuetype = Subtask AND fixVersion IS EMPTY

q: List all issues with affected version set across the PLAT project
jql: project = PLAT AND affectedVersion IS NOT EMPTY

q: Show me medium priority issues in BUGS that need component assignment
jql: project = BUGS AND priority = Medium AND component IS EMPTY

q: Find CRM tickets about fraud detection that have a fix version scheduled
jql: project = CRM AND text ~ "fraud" AND fixVersion IS NOT EMPTY

q: What issues in OPS have components but no fix version yet?
jql: project = OPS AND component IS NOT EMPTY AND fixVersion IS EMPTY

q: List all high priority issues across projects that are missing component assignment
jql: priority = High AND component IS EMPTY

q: Show issues in BUGS about mobile app that need a fix version
jql: project = BUGS AND text ~ "mobile" AND fixVersion IS EMPTY

q: Find all Platform Engineering issues that have an affected version but no fix version
jql: project = PLAT AND affectedVersion IS NOT EMPTY AND fixVersion IS EMPTY

q: What CRM issues about account security have components assigned?
jql: project = CRM AND text ~ "account" AND component IS NOT EMPTY

q: List issues in BUGS with low priority that are missing both component and fix version
jql: project = BUGS AND priority = Low AND component IS EMPTY AND fixVersion IS EMPTY

q: Show me all Sample Project issues that have a component but are not resolved
jql: project = SMP AND component IS NOT EMPTY AND resolution IS EMPTY

q: Find issues created in the last 30 days that have a fix version assigned
jql: created >= -30d AND fixVersion IS NOT EMPTY

q: What CRM issues about incident management are without a scheduled fix version?
jql: project = CRM AND text ~ "incident" AND fixVersion IS EMPTY
